description: w wersji na telefon dla roli TECh usun sidebars i wszelka mozliwosc edycji/dodawania czegokolwiek - brak sidbars, tylko podglad z opcja kolorowania po statusie, a dla PM daj dodatkowo mozliwosc edycji LABEl, dodawania komentarzy do obiektow/ikon, oraz dodawanie dla nich galerii/zdjec
title: w wersji na telefon dla roli TECh usun sidebars i wszelka mozliwosc edycji/dodawania czegokolwiek -

criteria.description: On mobile devices, users with role 'TECH' cannot see or open LayerPanel or PropertiesPanel sidebars.
criteria.how_to_verify: Check conditional rendering in client/src/pages/home.tsx for TECH role + isMobile.

criteria.description: Object dragging and resizing (react-rnd) is disabled for TECH role on mobile.
criteria.how_to_verify: Verify 'disableDragging' and 'enableResizing={false}' props in ObjectRenderer.tsx when role is TECH and isMobile is true.

criteria.description: The 'Color by Status' feature is accessible to TECH users on mobile via the UI.
criteria.how_to_verify: Confirm MobileBottomBar.tsx contains a toggle or button for status coloring visible to TECH role.

criteria.description: PM users on mobile can edit the 'name' (label) field of a selected object.
criteria.how_to_verify: Check for an enabled Input or Textarea for 'name' in the mobile properties view for PM role.

criteria.description: PM users on mobile can view and add photos via the ObjectPhotoGallery component.
criteria.how_to_verify: Verify ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx is rendered and functional for PM role on mobile.

criteria.description: The EditorObject type in types.ts includes an optional 'comments' string or string array.
criteria.how_to_verify: Inspect client/src/lib/types.ts for the presence of 'comments' field in EditorObject interface.

criteria.description: Drawing mode is forced to 'select' and tool selection is disabled for TECH role on mobile.
criteria.how_to_verify: Check dispatch logic or tool filtering in Toolbar.tsx/MobileBottomBar.tsx for TECH role on mobile.
